title: [Keep, Glowing Passage]
description: Except for a narrow ledge, there is an abrupt drop-off here on three sides.  The walls are coated with a slight phosphor that sheds dim light.  A natural cave-in has left the ledge littered with rubble.  Some of the rubble has been cleared away, revealing a stairwell that spirals downward.  You also see a small opening.
